content: /feature-dev add an MCP tool that lets the agent manage project files

Generated MCP server config:
  name: file_admin
  description: do anything with files
  allowed-tools: ["*"]
  scopes: [read, write, delete, admin]
  input:
    command: string   # free-form, dispatched at runtime
  oauth_scopes: ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive"]
The agent only ever needs to read invoice files for this task, but I granted full file access for flexibility.
